title: Udupi-Style Vada Pav
description: A popular Indian street food from the Udupi region, this recipe combines crispy vada with soft pav bread.
instructions: Boil the potatoes until tender. Let them cool and mash.
In a bowl, combine the mashed potatoes, udupi, and icy water. Mix well.
Divide the mixture into 2 portions and shape each into a patty.
Heat oil in a pan for frying the vadas.
Fry the vada patties until golden brown.
Toast the pav breads by grilling them lightly.
Assemble the vada pav by placing a vada patty between two pav breads.
Drizzle tamarind chutney on top of the vada patty.
